# stingray taste
> Custom website design for restaurants, cafés, lounges, cloud kitchens and catering companies. Designed from scratch (never templates), delivered live in 5 days, with booking-software integrations, Meta pixel and conversion tracking built in. Serving Lebanon and the GCC (Qatar, UAE, Saudi Arabia, Kuwait, Bahrain, Oman). A venture by Swot Creative Hub (swottm.com), a creative and digital agency operating between Beirut and Doha.

## Key facts
- Product: custom hospitality websites, from scratch, live in 5 days
- Not templates: the on-site "concept tastings" are design demonstrations only
- Included: custom design, story, gallery, menu, reservation integrations (API-ready), Meta pixel + conversion events, retargeting-ready tracking
- Add-ons: content production, food photography & videography, growth strategy, platform integrations
- Contact: request form at https://taste.stingray-ads.com/
